ddls:
CREATE TABLE "objectives" (
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each objective */,
  "objective_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the objective */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the objective */,
  "target_date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target date */,
  "target_value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target value */,
  "target_relevance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target relevance */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager responsible for the objective */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the objective was created */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the objective */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the objective was completed */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of the objective completion */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the objective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("objective_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objectives_target_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_date_id") REFERENCES target_date_types ("target_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objectives_target_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_value_id") REFERENCES target_value_types ("target_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objectives_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objectives_target_relevance_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_relevance_id") REFERENCES target_relevance_types ("target_relevance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objectives_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the project manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the project manager belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_date_types" (
  "target_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target date type */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date (e.g., 2017, Ongoing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target date */,
  "target_date_format" TEXT /* Format of the target date (e.g., Year, Quarter, Month) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_value_types" (
  "target_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target value type */,
  "target_value" TEXT /* Target value to be achieved (e.g., 100%, Investigation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target value */,
  "target_value_format" TEXT /* Format of the target value (e.g., Percentage, Number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_relevance_types" (
  "target_relevance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target relevance type */,
  "target_relevance" TEXT /* Geographic relevance (e.g., Germany, Global) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geographic relevance */,
  "target_relevance_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the target relevance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_relevance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objective_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* ID of the objective being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., Progress Update, Status Change) */,
  "update_file_path" TEXT /* File path of the update file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objective_updates_updated_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objective_updates_objective_id FOREIGN KEY ("objective_id") REFERENCES objectives ("objective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* ID of the objective the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Progress Report, Final Report) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Finalized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_objective_id FOREIGN KEY ("objective_id") REFERENCES objectives ("objective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* ID of the objective that depends on another objective */,
  "dependent_objective_id" INTEGER /* ID of the objective being depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., sequential, parallel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "dependency_status" TEXT /* Status of the dependency (e.g., Active, Resolved) */,
  "dependency_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_dependent_objective_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_objective_id") REFERENCES objectives ("objective_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_objective_id FOREIGN KEY ("objective_id") REFERENCES objectives ("objective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
